summary: The video shows a first-person view from a vehicle traveling on a wet road with two lanes in each direction. The road is bordered by greenery and rail tracks. A yellow tram is seen on the right side of the road, alongside some buildings and fencing.

events_timeline.event: A car travels ahead of the ego-vehicle in the same lane.

uncertainties: The identity of the tram is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions observed.
